context: Agent was asked to create a collapsed, important-type callout with a custom title 'Key Deadline' and highlighted date text inside it.

checklist.name: Callout uses 'important' type
checklist.description: The callout opening line uses [!important] (e.g. > [!important]- or > [!important]+)

checklist.name: Callout is collapsed by default
checklist.description: The callout opening line includes a minus sign after the type bracket: > [!important]- (not + and not missing the symbol entirely)

checklist.name: Custom title on the opening line
checklist.description: The text 'Key Deadline' appears on the same line as the callout type declaration (e.g. > [!important]- Key Deadline)

checklist.name: Highlighted date uses == syntax
checklist.description: The date or relevant text inside the callout body is wrapped in ==...== highlight syntax (e.g. ==April 15th==)
